title: Falcon 1 first flight
details: The first Falcon 1 rocket launched from Omelek Island but failed due to a fuel leak and fire about 25 seconds after liftoff.

title: Falcon 1 first successful launch
details: Falcon 1 became the first privately developed liquid fuel rocket to reach orbit, carrying a mass simulator.

title: First Dragon capsule reaches ISS
details: SpaceX's Dragon became the first commercial spacecraft to visit the International Space Station, delivering 400 kg of cargo.

title: First booster landing on ground
details: Falcon 9 first stage landed at Landing Zone 1 at Cape Canaveral, the first successful orbital rocket booster landing.

title: First drone ship landing
details: Falcon 9 first stage successfully landed on the Autonomous Spaceport Drone Ship 'Of Course I Still Love You' for the first time.

title: First reused booster launch
details: Falcon 9 launched with a previously flown first stage (B1021), marking the first reflight of an orbital class rocket.

title: Falcon Heavy maiden flight
details: Falcon Heavy launched successfully on its maiden flight, carrying Elon Musk's Tesla Roadster into heliocentric orbit.

title: First Crew Dragon launch (Demo-1)
details: SpaceX's Crew Dragon spacecraft launched on an uncrewed test flight to the International Space Station.

title: First crewed Crew Dragon launch (Demo-2)
details: SpaceX launched NASA astronauts Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley to the ISS, the first crewed orbital launch from US soil since 2011.

title: Starship first integrated flight test
details: SpaceX's Starship launched on its first integrated flight test, reaching an altitude of 39 km before undergoing a rapid unscheduled disassembly.
